{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Monarch technique
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Monarch technique]] involving water madra and malicious spirits was used.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
